CheckTitle: Internal apps can access Google Workspace APIs
Description: The domain-level API controls configuration **trusts internal domain-owned apps** to access restricted Google Workspace APIs. This avoids the need to individually trust each internal app.
Risk: When internal apps are not trusted, legitimate **organization-built applications** cannot access restricted Google Workspace API scopes, potentially **breaking internal workflows** and forcing administrators to trust each app individually, which increases administrative overhead.

Code.Other:
1. Sign in to the Google **Admin console** at https://admin.google.com
2. Navigate to **Security** > **Access and Data Control** > **API Controls**
3. Click **App access control** > **Settings**
4. Check **Trust internal, domain-owned apps**
5. Click **Save**

Recommendation.Text: Enable **trust for internal domain-owned apps** so organization-built applications can access restricted Google Workspace APIs without individual trust configuration.
